title: lolium interruptum subsp. corsicum
intro: Lolium interruptum subsp. corsicum, also known as Italian rye-grass, is a subspecies of Lolium interruptum, a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi, making it a potential natural remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Lolium interruptum subsp. corsicum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
